$schema_hint: Per-media-type Wikidata P31 allow-lists applied to CirrusSearch text reconciliation. Consumed by ReconciliationAdapter.BuildStage2Request via CirrusTypeFilterConfiguration. When a media type is missing from this map, the adapter falls back to 'no text fallback' — the library's TextStage2Request requires a non-empty cirrus_search_types list. Media type key names are lower-cased and must match the MediaType enum after ToLowerInvariant().
